string.text: Friend of the "Bandits"
Your relationship with the "Bandits" has improved.
You have helped the "Bandits" many times. Now, traders from this faction will offer you more and rarer items.
Achievement "Friend of the Bandits" unlocked.
Friend of the "Duty"
Your relationship with the "Duty" faction has improved.
You have helped the "Duty" faction many times. Now, traders from this faction will offer you more and rarer items.
Achievement "Friend of the Duty" unlocked.
Friend of the "Scientists"
Your relationship with the "Scientists" has improved.
You have helped the "Scientists" many times. Now, traders from this faction will offer you more and rarer items.
Achievement "Friend of the Scientists" unlocked.
Friend of the "Freedom"
Your relationship with the "Freedom" faction has improved.
You have helped the "Freedom" faction many times. Now, traders from this faction will offer you more and rarer items.
Achievement "Friend of the Freedom" unlocked.

Your relationship with the "Mercenaries" has improved.
You have helped the "Mercenaries" many times. Now, traders from this faction will offer you more and rarer items.
